Video.summary: Rick Hunter's back. He's considering marrying his girlfriend. But before he could, she is murdered.
Video.title: The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.

Image.alt: The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.
The Return Of Hunter: Everyone Walks In L.A.

Video.summary: Hunter goes to Australia to help solve a murder involving a former girlfriend who's been missing for 3 years.
Video.title: Down And Under

Video.summary: When Nick Colette, the hot-headed son of a "retired" mobster Tommy Colette, joins forces with his father, Eastbridge's crime troubles start.
Video.title: Family Business

Video.summary: When the majority of Tony's officers stage a sick-out in the wake of a wage dispute, Eastbridge becomes an open city for crime.
Video.title: Blue Flu

Video.summary: Following the death of his gangster son in a police shootout, mobster Tommy Colette vows to kill Tony Scali himself.
Video.title: Out Of Business

Video.summary: A murder, but the victim seemingly never existed, and the killing appears to be professionally done.
Video.title: Not Just Another John Doe

Video.summary: Tony's son David is shocked when his friend Jason shoots Brad Harris, the school bully. What follows is a crisis of conscience.
Video.title: Guns & Sons

Video.summary: Commissioner Scali and his team of officers pull out all stops as they try to beat the clock in a desperate search for the kidnapper of a very sick baby.
Video.title: The Sharp Pinch

Video.summary: Tony suspects foul play when a member of a commando-like squad of elite prep-school students -- perpetrators of a series of break-in thefts -- disappears.
Video.title: Dead Cadet's Society

Video.summary: When Hunter disappears during an investigation, McCall and her new partner must find him before he's killed.
Video.title: Shades

Video.summary: One of Tony's men, Danny Nolan, goes ballistic when Joe Lund, the gun-wielding ex-husband of the woman Dan's been seeing, takes her hostage.
Video.title: The Ides Of March

Video.summary: McCall fears that Hunter's temper will outweigh his judgement when his former girlfriend is murdered.
Video.title: Crossfire

Video.summary: McCall masquerades as a nightclub singer to investigate the disappearance of a rock music star.
Video.title: The Cradle Will Rock

Video.summary: McCall is shot and paralyzed after learning about a prostitution ring operating in a fleet of motor homes.
Video.title: Hot Pursuit, Part 1

Video.summary: As doctors prepare to operate on McCall, Hunter races to find whoever is killing potential witnesses.
Video.title: Hot Pursuit, Part 2

Video.summary: Hunter and McCall's kidnapping-homicide investigation is thwarted by a rich industrialist.
Video.title: The Contract

Video.summary: The malicious leader of paramilitary neo-Nazis take Hunter and McCall captive while planning their next attack
Video.title: Bad Company

Video.summary: Stella Stevens guest stars as a reclusive former movie queen -- and one of Tony's all-time fim favorites -- who is implicated in the real-life murder of her lover.
Video.title: Eastbridge Boulevard

Video.summary: Commissioner Scali, kidnapped and seemingly destined for sudden death, narrowly escapes his fate with the help of an unsuspected ally -- porno movie producer Cyd Palmer.
Video.title: Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2

Image.alt: Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2
Adventures In The Skin Trade, Part 2

Video.summary: After the murder of a crime boss, Hunter and McCall face an ethical dilemma: arrest the killer or let him go.
Video.title: Playing God

Video.summary: When Reno walks into a museum robbery in progress while meeting with Judge Sarah Jessup, both he and the judge are "introduced" to disillusioned Special Investigations cop, Carrick O'Quinn.
Video.title: Carrick O'Quinn

Video.summary: When Reno stands trial for the murder of Buzzy Burrell, his quest for justice is complicated by Lt. Dutch Dixon who plans to insure that Reno never makes it to court alive.
Video.title: The Trial Of Reno Raines

Video.summary: As Reno waits out his pending appeal for murder, he is transfered to Paso Perdido Penitentiary where he finds himself in danger from the prison population as well as the law.
Video.title: Escape

Video.summary: When Reno is saved during a bar fight by a man strongly resembling Elvis Presley, he attempts to track down "the King" to express his thanks as well as satisfy his curiosity.
Video.title: The King And I

Video.summary: Reno's freedom appears within reach when he goes after his nemesis Lt. Dutch Dixon who is wanted for the murder of his own partner.
Video.title: Dutch On The Run
